_comment: Locks the Gemini S2S (Gemini Translate) target-language BCP-47 mapping's explicit special cases, hand-duplicated between Windows (websocket.rs live_translate_target_language_code) and Android (GeminiS2sProtocol.kt targetLanguageCode). Only the explicit special-case arms + empty are locked — both platforms code them identically. The general name->code FALLBACK is intentionally NOT locked: Windows uses the isolang crate, Android uses LanguageCatalog, so arbitrary language names may differ (the UI offers a fixed set). Windows is canonical. See .claude/parity/gemini-s2s-vad.md.
